# Iteration 12 — Final ticket of the program

PR #28 opened. The Vehicles slice is now complete: schema, migrations, service, API, UI, tests, and docs. This is the final ticket of the program (Phase 0 finish + Vehicles slice).

The program is complete. No further iterations are needed. The operator should now start a new program for the next slice (Drivers) when ready, after reviewing the Vehicles slice's behavior in production for at least a few working days.

I did not draft a next-session prompt because there is no next iteration.

End of program.
